withdrawal_reason: Two EXP-255 files were created on 2026-04-26 by separate analyst runs targeting HNOTE-007 (overview rework). The earlier file (this one, created 2026-04-26T00:11:35.949Z) addressed only Item 1 (hero swap). A subsequent run (2026-04-26T02:10:46.744Z) delivered EXP-255-overview-hero-rework.json covering Items 1+2+5 in a single coordinated EXP per HNOTE chunking guidance. The tracker entry for EXP-255 points to the canonical file (overview-hero-rework). This duplicate was orphaned — same exp_id, same target area, smaller scope — and is withdrawn here to prevent the decider from applying both.
decider_instructions: IGNORE this file. Apply only EXP-255-overview-hero-rework.json. This stub exists because FUSE filesystem cannot unlink files; the original superseded content has been replaced by this withdrawal notice.
cleanup_pattern_reference: Same pattern as EXP-250-phase-b3-prefix-unification.json withdrawal noted in HNOTE-001 consumed_progress (B3_prefix_unification.delivery_note, 2026-04-25T17:18Z). Operational lesson: scheduler-side parallel-run guard (Phase 3.1) would prevent these duplicates.
